_comment_mcp_servers: MCP server configs. Fill in credentials via environment variables — DO NOT commit real keys. See references/MCP-SETUP.md for installation commands.

polygon._note: Polygon.io MCP server — ad-hoc ticker/options queries and schema inspection. NOT for backtest data (use Postgres cache).

postgres._note: Read-only connection to dev Postgres. Use a read-only role at the DB level; do not grant write access to the MCP user.

github._note: GitHub MCP — manage PRs/issues on learn-ai AND read reference repos at specific commits for porting.

_comment_permissions: Permissions scoping for this project. Deny dangerous operations by default; explicitly allow the ones we need.
